title: No Zombie Babies
description: A datapack that rids the world of pesky zombie babies.
body:
![the words "NO MORE ZOMBIE BABIES" in one of Minecraft's fonts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27eb6ca53ebb7b696639f2e4ea49be7c5a3059f9.png)

Many Minecraft players seethe over the dreaded baby zombie, but today we put an end to this terrible todder's terror once in for all...

This simple datapack makes sure to remove baby zombies throughout your world, so YOU can play Minecraft how it was MEANT to be played!

I've created this simple datapack in around a few hours to pinpoint all baby zombies that spawn around the player, and immediately banish them to the nether! (the /kill command, lol)

Anyone is free to use this datapack for any purpose, as well as edit the code in any way they like. Credit is appreciated, but not necessary, as it is a very simple datapack.

Feel free to leave feedback about bugs and compatibility issues in my discord located at the Links tab on this page. Thank you! :)
